zh.lifeSummary: Ann Threlkeld於大約1451年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德陽瓦斯 安德 易亞蒙特 布里奇。她和Hugh Lowther至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。她去世在英國英格蘭恩布利亞，埋葬在英國英格蘭恩布利亞洛福黑。

nameMeanings.name: Threlkeld
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cumbria): habitational name from Threlkeld in Cumbria, so named from Old Norse thrǽll ‘thrall, serf’ + kelda ‘spring, marshy place’.

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: Ann Threlkeld was born about 1451, in Yanwath and Eamont Bridge, Westmorland, England. She had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Hugh Lowther. She died in Cumbria, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Lowther, Cumbria, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Ann Threlkeldは約1451年にイギリスウエストモーランドヤンワス アンド エアモント ブリッジで生まれた。彼女はHugh Lowtherとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女はイギリスイギリスクウンブリアで死去し，イギリスイギリスクウンブリアロウスエルにて埋葬された。

ko.Yanwath and Eamont Bridge, Westmorland,: 영국 웨스트모를랜드 얀왓h 앤드 이몽 브리지
ko.lifeSummary: Ann Threlkeld(은)는 대략 1451년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 얀왓h 앤드 이몽 브리지에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Hugh Lowther(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 c브리아에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 c브리아 로터에 묻혔다.

ru.Yanwath and Eamont Bridge, Westmorland,: янват анд эамонт бридж, вестморланд, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Ann Threlkeld родилась около 1451 г. в местности янват анд эамонт бридж, вестморланд, Англия. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Hugh Lowther. Она умерла в местности кумбря, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности лоутир, кумбря, Англия, Великобритания.
